ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: URL of the Graphnosis local MCP bridge. Matches Graphnosis → Settings → VS Code.
ast.target: Graphnosis 本地 MCP 桥接的 URL。与 Graphnosis → 设置 → VS Code 匹配。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Copy from Graphnosis app → Settings → VS Code tab.
ast.target: 从 Graphnosis 应用 → 设置 → VS Code 选项卡复制。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Verify the bridge is reachable with the current token.
ast.target: 使用当前令牌验证桥接是否可达。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Engram (graph) that "Save current note" and vault sync write into. If it doesn't exist yet, the Graphnosis app shows a one-click banner to create it on first save.
ast.target: “保存当前笔记”和保险库同步写入的 Engram（图表）。如果尚不存在，Graphnosis 应用会在首次保存时显示一个一键横幅来创建它。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Token budget passed to each recall query.
ast.target: 传递给每个召回查询的令牌预算。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Graphnosis: enter a bearer token first.
ast.target: Graphnosis：请先输入 Bearer 令牌。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Graphnosis: open a note in edit mode to insert the result.
ast.target: Graphnosis：请在编辑模式下打开一个笔记以插入结果。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Graphnosis: configure bearer token first (Settings → Graphnosis).
ast.target: Graphnosis：请先配置 Bearer 令牌（设置 → Graphnosis）。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Graphnosis: open Settings → Graphnosis to paste your bearer token.
ast.target: Graphnosis：请打开设置 → Graphnosis 以粘贴您的 Bearer 令牌。
